title: senecio lamarckianus
intro: Senecio lamarckianus, also known as Ragwort, is a perennial plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating various health issues such as skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Senecio lamarckianus include reducing inflammation, promoting healing, and providing relief from pain and fever, as well as supporting the immune system. Senecio lamarckianus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile remedy for various health conditions.
